title: Feedback Log Entry Schema
description: Machine-parseable schema for FEEDBACK-LOG entries. Enables automated pre-flight checks and pattern analysis.

version.description: Semantic version of the feedback log when this entry was added.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date when the error was discovered.

agent.description: Agent ID that committed the error (e.g., 'BACKEND_DEV').

file.description: Optional. Specific file where the error was found.

severity.description: Impact severity. Critical = security/data-loss. High = broken functionality. Medium = degraded quality. Low = cosmetic.

error_description.description: Precise, technical description of the error.

correction.description: Exact correction applied to resolve the error.

golden_rule.description: Universal rule derived from this error. Must be quotable and actionable.

categories.description: Category tags for automated pre-flight filtering.

affected_agents.description: List of agent IDs that should pay special attention to this rule.
